ocr_findings.description: OCR text uses '正語' (line 33: 'LPWAの正語は') where the image clearly shows '正式名称' or similar; minor character substitution in explanation text that does not affect answer correctness

reviewer_notes: 解答・解説 page for questions 14-8 through 14-15. All answer letters and explanations captured with high fidelity. The page is a continuation of the 出る順！過去問 section; 'exam' label is appropriate. One minor wrong_char in the LPWA explanation (low severity, does not change meaning materially). No missing answers or structural issues.
